indicators.name: Large open space
indicators.rationale: The large open space allows for a wide range of movement and stretching.

indicators.name: Natural light
indicators.rationale: Natural light can help set a calming atmosphere for yoga practice.

indicators.name: Potted plants
indicators.rationale: Potted plants add a touch of nature but do not obstruct the space significantly.

reasoning_summary: The space is well-suited for yoga and stretching due to its large open area and natural lighting, while the potted plants add a pleasant touch without obstructing the space.
